title: iShares MSCI World ETF's Tech-Heavy Bet Faces a Critical Week
sentences: iShares MSCI World ETF's Tech-Heavy Bet Faces a Critical Week The iShares MSCI World ETF, heavily weighted in technology, faces a critical week as key tech companies like Tesla, Apple, and Microsoft report earnings.
Tesla's recent struggles put pressure on the ETF, which allocates a significant portion to the information technology sector.
Additionally, a major overhaul of MSCI's index methodology in May 2026 is expected to cause significant portfolio adjustments for the fund.
